summary: Frontend E2E tested Club Dashboard + Member Management flow end-to-end via /fr/club-login → /fr/club-dashboard. All 6 requested flows PASSED: registration, login+redirect, dashboard shows dojo name+city, add member (Pierre Martin, 4e_kyu, cotisation payée), member list renders with email/phone/grade/subscription badges, edit member (toggle subscription) submitted successfully.

issues: Stats cards (Total Membres / Membres Actifs / Nouveaux ce mois) do not auto-refresh when returning to the tab after adding a member — they only refresh on full page reload. Consider re-fetching stats when the dashboard tab is re-activated or after any member CRUD action.

action_items: (Minor UX) Refresh dashboard stats after member add/edit/delete or when switching back to Tableau de bord tab.
critical_code_review_comments: club-dashboard/page.tsx is 1014 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting into modules: components/DashboardTab.tsx, components/MembersTab.tsx, components/AddMemberModal.tsx, components/EditMemberModal.tsx, components/SettingsTab.tsx.
Good use of data-testid on member form inputs, submit button, and row-level edit/delete buttons — testability is solid.
server.py still 6200+ lines (flagged previously) — split into routers/ modules.
test_credentials: Used dynamic account: test_marseille_<uuid>@test.com / Pass123456. Pre-existing per task: testclub_api@test.com / test123456.
seed_data_creation: Each run creates a new club (Test Aikido Marseille) + 1 member (Pierre Martin) with unique uuid suffix in MongoDB. Not cleaned up (endpoints don't require TEST_ prefix).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full club-dashboard flow works: registration → auto-login → /fr/club-dashboard render (name+city header, 4 stat cards, quick actions), Membres tab with Add/Edit/Delete modals, Paramètres tab. data-testids present: member-firstname-input, member-lastname-input, member-email-input, member-phone-input, member-birthdate-input, member-belt-select, member-subscription-checkbox, member-submit-btn, member-row-{id}, edit-member-{id}, delete-member-{id}. Backend endpoints /api/club/members (GET/POST) and /api/club/members/{id} (PUT/DELETE) confirmed functional via UI integration.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs in requested scope.
